This site is apart of the KC giving Grove: https://www.givinggrove.org/volunteer

Lily Creek Farms (steward and owner) will manage the orchard along with the site and mowing. Orchard includes Euro pears, Asian pears, apples, peaches, and bush cherries. Acces
